Describe the changes in equipment and support objects around the lawnmower throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 4s, a red oil drain pan sits near the tilted red lawnmower on the concrete; at 8s, a red fuel container appears behind the mower replacing the pan; at 14s, rectangular bricks are placed under the lawnmower wheels to prop it up; at 18s, a large black roller attachment is visible on the mower while a finger enters the frame.

question: Describe the positioning and orientation of the red lawnmower as the video progresses.
canonical_answer: At 4s, the red lawnmower is tilted onto its side on the walkway; at 6s, the black undercarriage and wheels are exposed to the camera; at 10s, the front end is elevated off the ground near a wooden pallet; at 18s, the mower is propped up by a brick with a roller attachment visible.
